edition: Chowkhamba Sanskrit Series Nos. 70, 185, 209, Banaras 1903–1915 (Vindhyeśvarī Prasāda Dvivedī)

expected_text_units.source_for_estimate: Brahma-Sūtra canonical count; Bhāskara comments on the standard 555-sūtra sequence

ground_truth_source: No mature digital comparator for Bhāskara's bhāṣya text; partial GRETIL fragments only.
first_page_visual_quality_notes: Heuristic (KB/page ~286): standard Chowkhamba 1915 typesetting. Adobe PDF Scan Library producer; expect typical archive.org Devanagari scan with some half-tone bleed.
ocr_friendliness_notes: Clean Devanagari typeset, single-column. Should be one of the OCR-friendliest texts in the priority-12.
ia_filename: Brahma Sutra Bhashya of Bhaskar Nos. 70 , 185, 209 Year 1915 - Chowkhamba Sanskrit Series.pdf
